summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner. It opens with a full-screen graphic headed FAIRFAX ILLEGAL MIGRANT MURDER SUSPECTS showing three booking photos, each with a name and bullet-point details about nationality and charges. The segment cuts to a man in a suit and tie speaking at a podium in front of a U.S. flag and a Department of Homeland Security seal, then to a reporter in an auditorium. The lower-third reads I.C.E. MARKS 1 YEAR SINCE CREATION OF VOICE OFFICE.

script.scene: A graphic headed FAIRFAX ILLEGAL MIGRANT MURDER SUSPECTS shows three booking photos with names and bullet-point details.
A man in a suit speaks at a podium in front of a U.S. flag and a DHS seal; lower-third reads I.C.E. MARKS 1 YEAR SINCE CREATION OF VOICE OFFICE.
A reporter speaks in an auditorium; the FOX NEWS ALERT banner remains.

notable_text: FAIRFAX ILLEGAL MIGRANT MURDER SUSPECTS; FOX NEWS ALERT; I.C.E. MARKS 1 YEAR SINCE CREATION OF VOICE OFFICE; WASHINGTON
